task_completion.description: The agent loads the CT scan in 3D Slicer and navigates to an axial slice showing the four chambers of the heart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 3D Slicer interface with a CT scan loaded. The axial view (usually Red slice view) should display the heart with both ventricles visible.

task_completion.description: The agent places a measurement ruler across the Right Ventricle (RV).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler or line annotation is visible on the axial slice spanning the anterior, triangular-shaped chamber (RV). The measurement should be transverse (inner wall to inner wall).

task_completion.description: The agent places a measurement ruler across the Left Ventricle (LV).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler or line annotation is visible on the axial slice spanning the posterior-lateral, thick-walled chamber (LV). The measurement should be transverse.

task_completion.description: The agent generates the JSON report containing the measured diameters, calculated ratio, and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a text editor, terminal output, or Slicer python console displaying the JSON structure with fields 'rv_diameter_mm', 'lv_diameter_mm', 'rv_lv_ratio', and 'classification'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the measurement files and the report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a file explorer or terminal listing showing 'rv_measurement.mrk.json', 'lv_measurement.mrk.json', and 'cardiac_report.json' inside '~/Documents/SlicerData/Cardiac/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI (Markups module) to perform measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Slicer window is the primary focus, and ruler/markup tools are active or visible in the toolbar/module panel.

integrity.description: The agent derived values from the image rather than inputting arbitrary numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Rulers are visible on the scan image before or during the time the report values are generated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual medical imaging software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual 3D Slicer application window, not just a script editor or terminal for the entire duration.
